FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class ScrollEl

Namespace
FluentGpu.Dsl
Assembly
FluentGpu.Dsl.dll

A clipping, scrolling viewport over a single (possibly oversized) content child. Scroll is layout-free (layout.md §6): layout arranges the content at the content-box origin and publishes ContentSize; the -ScrollOffset translation is the content's LocalTransform, written by Input on wheel/drag.

public sealed record ScrollEl : Element, IEquatable<Element>, IEquatable<ScrollEl>

Content 

public Element Content { get; init; }

Property Value

Element

ContentSized

Measure to content when auto-sized, then clamp by Min/Max. Default false keeps ScrollView a hard viewport boundary for app/page/navigation scrolling; popup lists (ComboBox/MenuFlyout/AutoSuggest) opt in so short lists size to their rows and tall lists scroll after MaxHeight.

public bool ContentSized { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
